hero.title: ROOT FURTHER
hero.eventStream: Live broadcast on the Sun* Family Facebook Group

rootFurther.title: ROOT FURTHER
rootFurther.body1:
Facing the storm-like changes of the AI era and ever-rising customer demands, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not only striving to be the elite in its field, but aiming higher, to a place where every Sunner is a “problem-solver”: an expert at resolving every issue and finding answers to every challenge of our projects, customers and society.
Inspired by this diversity of capability, flexible growth and the spirit of digging deep to break through in the AI era, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
Beyond its surface meaning, “Root Further” is the journey of reaching ever further, rooting ever deeper, touching hidden “geological” layers to keep surviving, rising and nurturing the Sun* people's ever-burning passion for creating value. Like roots constantly driving into the earth, weaving through each layer of “sediment” to absorb the finest nutrients, Sun* people too are absorbing nourishment from the era and the market's challenges to renew themselves every day, broaden their capabilities and firmly “take root” in the AI era — an entirely new, complex and unpredictable layer, yet one brimming with potential and opportunity.
rootFurther.quote: A tree with deep roots fears no storm
rootFurther.body2:
In the face of a storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization of individuals confident in their diverse capabilities — ready to create, embrace challenges and master change — is one that not only stands steady amid turbulence but also harnesses every advantage and conquers the challenges of the times. More than just the name of a new chapter in the organization's growth, “Root Further” is also an encouragement for each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock every potential, dare to break limits, and dare to become the most versatile and outstanding version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, diverse capability and harnessing the power of the times are prerequisites for endurance.
No one can foresee how many mysterious “geological” layers still lie deep within the “earth” of modern technology and markets. We only know that once “Root Further” has become a rooted spirit, we will feel no fear — only excitement before any uncharted territory on the journey forward. For we always believe that within those boundless realms lie countless wonders and chances to rise.

kudos.label: Recognition movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.description:
NEW AT SAA 2025
A peer recognition and appreciation initiative — happening for the first time for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share recognition and thanks to colleagues on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will serve as input for the Heads Council when selecting award recipients.

kudosRules.title: Rules
kudosRules.section1Heading: KUDOS RECIPIENTS: HERO BADGES FOR POSITIVE IMPACT
kudosRules.section1Intro: Based on the number of teammates who send you Kudos, you will earn the corresponding Hero badge, displayed directly next to your profile name

newHero.desc: The journey of spreading good things begins – the first words of thanks and recognition have found you.

risingHero.desc: Your presence is growing in your teammates' hearts through your kindness and dedication.

superHero.desc: You have become a trusted and beloved icon, always ready to support and remembered by many teammates.

legendHero.count: More than 20 people have sent you Kudos
legendHero.desc: You have become a legend – someone who leaves an unforgettable mark on the team through their heart and actions.

kudosRules.section2Heading: KUDOS SENDERS: COLLECT ALL 6 ICONS, WIN A MYSTERY GIFT
kudosRules.section2Intro: Every Kudos you send will be posted on the system and receive ❤️ reactions from the Sunner community. For every 5 ❤️ reactions, you can open 1 Secret Box, with a chance to receive one of 6 exclusive SAA icons.
kudosRules.section2Closing: Sunners who collect all 6 icons will receive a mystery gift from SAA 2025.
kudosRules.section3Body: The 5 Kudos that receive the most ❤️ reactions across all of Sun* will officially become Kudos Quốc Dân and be awarded a special gift from SAA 2025: Root Further.

desc.topTalent: The Top Talent award honors well-rounded, outstanding individuals — people who consistently demonstrate solid professional expertise and exceptional performance, who always deliver value beyond expectations and are highly regarded by clients and teammates. With a readiness to take on any mission the organization entrusts to them, they are a constant source of inspiration, driving motivation and creating a positive impact across the whole team.
desc.topProject: The Top Project award honors outstanding project teams with business results that exceed expectations, optimal operational efficiency, and a dedicated working spirit. These are projects of high technical complexity, strong optimization of resources and cost, valuable ideas proposed for clients, superior profitability, and positive client feedback. Their members strictly follow internal development standards, setting a benchmark for excellence and professionalism.
desc.topProjectLeader: The Top Project Leader award honors outstanding project managers — people who combine solid management skills, a powerful ability to inspire, and an “Aim High – Be Agile” mindset across every problem and context. Under their leadership, members not only overcome challenges and reach their goals together but also keep their fire of enthusiasm and Wasshoi spirit alive, growing into a finer, happier version of themselves.
desc.bestManager: The Best Manager award honors exemplary leaders — people who have led their teams to results beyond expectations, with a standout impact on business performance and the organization's sustainable growth. Under their leadership, teams consistently conquer and master every goal through multitasking capability, effective collaboration, and an agile, technology-driven mindset for the digital era. They inspire the team to become confident and energized, ready to embrace and even lead revolutionary change.
desc.signature: The Signature award honors an individual or team that embodies the distinctive spirit Sun* pursues in each era. In 2025, the Signature award honors the Creator — an individual or team with a proactive, sharp mindset who always sees opportunity within challenge and pioneers in action. They are keenly attuned to problems, quickly identifying them and offering practical solutions that bring clear value to projects, clients, or the organization. With the creative mindset and “Creator” spirit distinctive to Sun*, they not only respond positively to change but proactively create improvements, helping shape new standards for how Sun* people create value.
desc.mvp: The MVP award honors the single most outstanding individual of the year — the face that represents the entire Sun* community. They have shown superior capability, enduring dedication, and far-reaching influence, leaving a strong mark on Sun*'s journey throughout the year. Beyond performance and work results, they are a source of inspiration that spreads — through their thinking, actions, and positive influence on the team. The MVP embodies the full qualities of an outstanding Sun* person while carrying a great responsibility: to become the model representing Sun*'s people and spirit, helping lead the team toward new heights.
